sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) action, work, any thing well or ill done, more fully גְּמוּל יָדַיִם Jud. 9:16 Pro 12:14 Isa 3:11 in a good sense, a benefit, Psa 103:2. הֵשִׁיב גְּמוּלֹו לְ to repay actions to any one, i.e. his deeds. Psa 28:4, הָשֵׁב גְּמוּלָם לָהֶם; Pro 12:14 followed by עַל Psa 94:2. שִׁלֵּם גְּמוּל לְ id. Psa 137:8 Pro 19:17 followed by עַל Joel 4:4 .

(2) retribution, recompense, Isa 35:4. Root גָּמַל.
